name: Bid Wall Absorption (Pinnacle Threshold)
hypothesis: The 'bid wall absorption' signal (strong OBI + strong sell-side trade flow) has shown a consistent edge. This mutation tightens both OBI and trade imbalance thresholds to their practical limits (0.95 and -3.0 z-score) to isolate only the most extreme absorption events, testing if this boosts WR and expectancy despite an expected reduction in trade count.
